style.css:
<style>
*, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

:root {
  --win-bg:    #008080;
  --chrome:    #c0c0c0;
  --chrome-lt: #ffffff;
  --chrome-dk: #808080;
  --chrome-xdk:#404040;
  --titlebar:  #000080;
  --screen:    #ffffff;
  --good:      #008000;
  --accent:    #0000ee;
}

body {
  min-height: 100vh;
  background: var(--win-bg);
  background-image: repeating-linear-gradient(
    0deg, rgba(0,0,0,.04) 0px, rgba(0,0,0,.04) 1px, transparent 1px, transparent 4px
  );
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: 1rem;
  padding: 1.5rem 1rem;
  font-family: 'VT323', monospace;
}

.desktop-label {
  color: rgba(255,255,255,.75);
  font-size: .85rem;
  letter-spacing: .12em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  text-shadow: 1px 1px 0 rgba(0,0,0,.5);
}

/* ── WINDOW ── */
.window {
  width: 100%;
  max-width: 560px;
  background: var(--chrome);
  box-shadow:
    inset 1px 1px 0 var(--chrome-lt),
    inset -1px -1px 0 var(--chrome-xdk),
    inset 2px 2px 0 var(--chrome),
    inset -2px -2px 0 var(--chrome-dk),
    4px 4px 10px rgba(0,0,0,.5);
}

/* ── TITLE BAR ── */
.titlebar {
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, #000080 0%, #1084d0 100%);
  padding: 3px 4px 3px 6px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  user-select: none;
  gap: .4rem;
}
.titlebar-left {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 5px;
  min-width: 0;
}
.titlebar-icon {
  font-size: .75rem;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.titlebar-text {
  font-size: .82rem;
  color: #fff;
  white-space: nowrap;
  overflow: hidden;
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
}
.titlebar-btns { display: flex; gap: 2px; flex-shrink: 0; }
.win-btn {
  width: 18px; height: 16px;
  background: var(--chrome);
  border: none;
  font-size: .6rem;
  cursor: default;
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  font-family: 'VT323', monospace;
  color: #000;
  box-shadow:
    inset 1px 1px 0 #fff,
    inset -1px -1px 0 var(--chrome-xdk),
    inset 2px 2px 0 var(--chrome),
    inset -2px -2px 0 var(--chrome-dk);
}
.win-btn:active {
  box-shadow: inset 1px 1px 0 var(--chrome-dk), inset -1px -1px 0 #fff;
  transform: translate(1px,1px);
}

/* ── MENU BAR ── */
.menubar {
  background: var(--chrome);
  padding: 1px 4px;
  display: flex;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--chrome-dk);
}
.menu-item {
  font-size: .78rem;
  color: #000;
  padding: 2px 8px;
  cursor: default;
}
.menu-item:hover { background: var(--titlebar); color: #fff; }

/* ── TOOLBAR — loading bar via ::before ── */
.toolbar {
  background: var(--chrome);
  padding: 3px 5px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 3px;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--chrome-dk);
  position: relative;
}
.toolbar::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  bottom: 0; left: 0;
  height: 2px;
  width: 0%;
  background: var(--titlebar);
  z-index: 20;
}
.toolbar.loading::before {
  animation: loadbar .8s ease-out forwards;
}
@keyframes loadbar {
  0%   { width: 0%;   opacity: 1; }
  85%  { width: 100%; opacity: 1; }
  100% { width: 100%; opacity: 0; }
}

.toolbar-btn {
  background: var(--chrome);
  border: none;
  font-family: 'VT323', monospace;
  font-size: .78rem;
  padding: 1px 8px;
  cursor: default;
  color: #000;
  letter-spacing: .02em;
  box-shadow:
    inset 1px 1px 0 #fff,
    inset -1px -1px 0 var(--chrome-xdk),
    inset 2px 2px 0 var(--chrome),
    inset -2px -2px 0 var(--chrome-dk);
}
.toolbar-btn:disabled { color: var(--chrome-dk); }
.toolbar-btn:not(:disabled):active {
  box-shadow: inset 1px 1px 0 var(--chrome-dk), inset -1px -1px 0 #fff;
  transform: translate(1px,1px);
}
.sep {
  width: 1px;
  align-self: stretch;
  margin: 2px 3px;
  background: var(--chrome-dk);
  box-shadow: 1px 0 0 #fff;
}

/* ── ADDRESS ROW ── */
.addressrow {
  background: var(--chrome);
  padding: 2px 5px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 4px;
  border-bottom: 2px solid var(--chrome-dk);
  box-shadow: inset 0 -1px 0 #fff;
}
.addr-label { font-size: .75rem; color: #000; white-space: nowrap; }
.addressbar {
  flex: 1;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  background: #fff;
  box-shadow: inset 1px 1px 0 var(--chrome-dk), inset -1px -1px 0 #fff;
  padding: 1px 4px;
}
.addressbar input {
  border: none; outline: none;
  font-family: 'VT323', monospace;
  font-size: .8rem;
  color: #000;
  background: transparent;
  width: 100%;
}
.addr-go {
  font-size: .75rem;
  background: var(--chrome);
  border: none;
  padding: 1px 10px;
  font-family: 'VT323', monospace;
  cursor: pointer;
  color: #000;
  box-shadow:
    inset 1px 1px 0 #fff,
    inset -1px -1px 0 var(--chrome-xdk),
    inset 2px 2px 0 var(--chrome),
    inset -2px -2px 0 var(--chrome-dk);
}

/* ── SCREEN — vignette via ::after ── */
.screen {
  background: var(--screen);
  height: 280px;
  padding: 1rem 1.2rem;
  overflow: hidden;
  position: relative;
  transition: background .5s ease;
}
.screen.styled { background: #12121a; }

.screen::after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 0 rgba(0,0,0,0);
  pointer-events: none;
  z-index: 8;
  transition: box-shadow .6s ease;
}
.screen.styled::after {
  box-shadow: inset 0 0 70px 24px rgba(0,0,0,.65);
}

/* ── PAGE CONTENT — unstyled ── */
.page-content h1 {
  font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
  font-size: 1.6em;
  font-weight: bold;
  color: #000;
  margin-bottom: .6em;
  padding-bottom: .3em;
  border-bottom: 3px solid transparent;
  transition: font-family .45s ease, color .45s ease, border-color .45s ease, letter-spacing .45s ease;
}
.page-content p {
  font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
  font-size: .78em;
  color: #000;
  margin-bottom: .5em;
  line-height: 1.75;
  transition: font-family .45s ease, color .45s ease;
}
.page-content a {
  color: var(--accent);
  text-decoration: underline;
  font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
  border-bottom: 1px solid transparent;
  transition: color .45s ease, font-family .45s ease, border-color .45s ease, text-decoration .45s ease;
}
.page-content ul {
  font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
  font-size: .78em;
  color: #000;
  padding-left: 1.2em;
  margin-bottom: .5em;
  line-height: 1.75;
  transition: font-family .45s ease, color .45s ease;
}
.page-content li { margin-bottom: .2em; }
.page-content .btn-raw {
  font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
  font-size: .85em;
  padding: .5em 1.2em;
  background: var(--chrome);
  border: 2px solid;
  border-color: #fff #888 #888 #fff;
  border-radius: 0;
  cursor: pointer;
  color: #000;
  margin-top: .4em;
  display: inline-block;
  letter-spacing: 0;
  transition: font-family .45s, background .45s, color .45s, border-color .45s, border-radius .45s, letter-spacing .45s;
}

/* ── PAGE CONTENT — styled ── */
.screen.styled .page-content h1 {
  font-family: 'Special Elite', serif;
  color: #00FF2B;
  border-bottom-color: #00FF2B;
  letter-spacing: -.01em;
}
.screen.styled .page-content p {
  font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace;
  color: #00FF2B;
}
.screen.styled .page-content a {
  color: #00FF2B;
  text-decoration: none;
  border-bottom-color: #00FF2B;
  font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace;
}
.screen.styled .page-content ul {
  font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace;
  color: #00FF2B;
  list-style: '→ ';
}
.screen.styled .page-content .btn-raw {
  font-family: 'Special Elite', serif;
  color: #000;
  border-color: transparent;
  border-radius: 3px;
  letter-spacing: .04em;
}

/* ── STATUS BAR ── */
.statusbar {
  background: var(--chrome);
  border-top: 1px solid var(--chrome-lt);
  padding: 2px 4px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 2px;
}
.status-panel {
  font-size: .72rem;
  color: #000;
  padding: 1px 6px;
  box-shadow: inset 1px 1px 0 var(--chrome-dk), inset -1px -1px 0 #fff;
  flex: 1;
  white-space: nowrap;
  overflow: hidden;
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
}
.status-extra {
  font-size: .72rem;
  color: #000;
  padding: 1px 0;
  box-shadow: inset 1px 1px 0 var(--chrome-dk), inset -1px -1px 0 #fff;
  white-space: nowrap;
  overflow: hidden;
  max-width: 0;
  opacity: 0;
  transition: max-width .4s ease, opacity .3s ease, padding .3s ease;
}
.status-extra.visible {
  max-width: 180px;
  opacity: 1;
  padding: 1px 6px;
}
.status-dot-wrap {
  width: 18px; height: 18px;
  box-shadow: inset 1px 1px 0 var(--chrome-dk), inset -1px -1px 0 #fff;
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.status-dot {
  width: 8px; height: 8px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: var(--chrome-dk);
  transition: background .3s;
}

/* ── INJECTED ELEMENTS ── */
.js-link-tag {
  font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace;
  font-size: .6em;
  color: #888;
  display: block;
  margin-bottom: .6em;
  animation: fadein .3s ease;
}
.js-link-tag .attr-name   { color: #7a7aaa; }
.js-link-tag .attr-val    { color: #888840; }
.js-link-tag .tag-bracket { color: #bbb; }

.js-console {
  position: absolute;
  bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
  background: #0a0a0a;
  color: #00cc00;
  font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace;
  font-size: .62em;
  padding: .3rem .7rem;
  letter-spacing: .04em;
  animation: fadein .2s ease;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: .5rem;
  z-index: 9;
}
.js-console::before { content: '>'; color: #444; }

@keyframes fadein { from { opacity: 0; } to { opacity: 1; } }

/* ── TOGGLE — Win98 dialog button ── */
.toggle-wrap { display: flex; }
.toggle-btn {
  font-family: 'VT323', monospace;
  font-size: .95rem;
  letter-spacing: .05em;
  background: var(--chrome);
  border: none;
  padding: 8px 22px;
  cursor: pointer;
  color: #000;
  min-width: 120px;
  box-shadow:
    inset 1px 1px 0 #fff,
    inset -1px -1px 0 var(--chrome-xdk),
    inset 2px 2px 0 var(--chrome),
    inset -2px -2px 0 var(--chrome-dk);
}
.toggle-btn:active {
  box-shadow:
    inset 1px 1px 0 var(--chrome-dk),
    inset -1px -1px 0 #fff,
    inset 2px 2px 0 var(--chrome-xdk);
  transform: translate(1px,1px);
}
</style>
